meta_description: Useful tools for web developers: XML, JSON formatting; Escape/Unescape URL/XML/JSON; Text comparison; Share file.
meta_keywords: web, dev, tools, useful, xml, json, formatting, escape, share file, compare, text
url_page_copied_to_clipboard_msg: The link has been copied to the clipboard.
share_file_upload_page_copied_to_clipboa: The link has been copied to the clipboard.
share_file_upload_page_server_addr_title: Local server IP or default cloud.
share_file_upload_page_server_addr_descr:
If you select a local server, the link will contain your computer's IP address, not the cloud's.
Since the file is saved in your computer's RAM, do not close the application until the recipient of the link has used it.
share_file_upload_info_1: Select the file you want to share. For the cloud, the maximum file size is 5 megabytes.
share_file_upload_info_2: Or drag the file to the top area.
share_file_upload_info_3: Or paste the image from the clipboard by pressing Ctrl+V in the top area.
share_file_upload_info_4: Click Upload to upload the file and generate a link to it.
share_file_upload_info_6: Paste the link to the file from the clipboard.
drag_file_descr_2: or click on the area and press Ctrl+V
rest_client_response_copied_to_clipboard: The response has been copied to the clipboard.
